registry_path_note: JSON is used for the first durable registry artifact because the current Hermes runner environment does not have PyYAML installed; the repo-local shape mirrors the recommended lane-registry.yaml schema from docs/kanban-auto-chain-lane-pattern.md and can be renamed to YAML later without changing lane semantics.

lane_identity.autoclose_title_prefix: productization: auto-next doc-governed illegal transition guard:

duplicate_suppression_key_choice.reason: Suppress repeated narrow next-slice spawn attempts across repeated review cycles without depending on task ids.

clean_stop_condition: stop when no successor candidate is declared
stop when an equivalent open task already exists
stop when a recent duplicate candidate was already spawned
stop when the lane payload fails policy checks
human_decision_boundary: block when doc anchors are missing
block when verification requires a real repo/environment fix
block when the next step needs product or scope judgment

autoclose_messages.result: auto-accepted doc-governed illegal-transition guard proof slice
autoclose_messages.summary: Auto-closing narrow review-required guard/proof slice: doc-governed illegal-transition lane, needs_input only, focused verification bundle only, and explicit successor candidate present in the worker handoff.

productization: confirmation submission ui wiring over existing view model

productization: render confirmation submission payload in project shell

lane_identity.autoclose_title_prefix: productization: render confirmation submission payload in project shell

duplicate_suppression_key_choice.reason: Use the semantic next UI slice label to suppress duplicate auto-next cards across review reruns.

clean_stop_condition: stop when no next_smallest_ui_candidate is declared
stop when an equivalent open task already exists
stop when a recent duplicate candidate was already spawned
stop when the lane payload fails policy checks
human_decision_boundary: block when the next UI step exposes a real contract gap
block when the next step requires a UX or product scope choice
block when verification requires a real repo/environment fix

autoclose_messages.summary: Auto-closing narrow review-required workbench/UI slice: minimal product-shell lane, needs_input only, focused project-view verification bundle only, and explicit UI successor present in the worker handoff.

lanes.worker_handoff_note: If this slice should auto-chain, include a JSON review-required handoff comment with changed_files, verification_commands, next_smallest_ui_candidate, and the exact next smallest UI slice name. For the current lane, default that successor to confirmation submission UI wiring over the existing project view model without widening backend contracts unless the docs or repo state prove a smaller user-facing slice instead.
